zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma FitzOrm於1145年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Ralph FitzOrm25歲，母親Lettice Montgomery36歲。她於1170年與Sir Adam De Aldithley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1200年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma FitzOrm于1145年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲Ralph FitzOrm25岁，母亲Lettice Montgomery36岁。她于1170年与Sir Adam De Aldithley结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1200年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma FitzOrm was born in 1145, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph FitzOrm, was 25 and her mother, Lettice Montgomery, was 36. She married Sir Adam De Aldithley in 1170. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1200, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma FitzOrm est née en 1145, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph FitzOrm, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lettice Montgomery, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam De Aldithley en 1170. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1200, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma FitzOrm 1145 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph FitzOrm 25 und ihre Mutter Lettice Montgomery 36. Sie hat 1170 Sir Adam De Aldithley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1200 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma FitzOrm è nata il nel 1145 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph FitzOrm, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lettice Montgomery, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam De Aldithley nel 1170. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1200, nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma FitzOrmが1145年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph FitzOrmは25歳，母Lettice Montgomeryは36歳であった。1170年にSir Adam De Aldithleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1200年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma FitzOrm(이)가 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph FitzOrm(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lettice Montgomery(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1170년 Sir Adam De Aldithley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma FitzOrm nasceu em 1145, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph FitzOrm, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lettice Montgomery, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Adam De Aldithley em 1170. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1200, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma FitzOrm родилась в 1145 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph FitzOrm было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lettice Montgomery, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam De Aldithley в 1170 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1200 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma FitzOrm nació en 1145, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph FitzOrm, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lettice Montgomery, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Adam De Aldithley en 1170. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1200, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
